message:
test(eso): add 9 ESO isomorphism proof tests for memory leak hardening [ft-3kxe.6]

ESO (Extreme Software Optimization) behavioral equivalence proofs for
each bounded buffer cap introduced by fork hardening:

- EventDeduplicator: within-budget isomorphism + adversarial overflow
  evicts oldest (2 tests)
- NotificationCooldown: within-budget all keys tracked (1 test)
- RateLimitTracker: pane cap + event-per-pane cap within budget (2 tests)
- RingBuffer: within-budget order preserved + overflow evicts oldest (2 tests)
- DetectionContext: within-budget all seen keys retained (1 test)
- ScrollbackEvictor: deterministic planning + tier priority ordering (1 test)

Each proof documents:
  - Ordering preserved: yes
  - Tie-breaking unchanged: yes
  - Floating-point: N/A
  - Golden outputs: deterministic assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
